markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, refine strategy, and discuss engagement renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Impressions grew from \~2k to 34k in 20 days, with 6 of 19 articles now ranking. The "quote-to-cash" article's failure to rank is a key concern, as it targets a core business keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Process Fix:** To resolve recurring AI errors (e.g., confusing payments/invoices, incorrect capitalization), Turnstile will now directly edit the `Writing Guidelines` Notion doc. GrowthX will first apply all existing meta-feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Strategy Refinement:** The "Revenue Operations" cluster will be refocused on financial operations, avoiding topics like sales territories that are outside Turnstile's core expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Renewal:** Turnstile will renew, contingent on two success metrics: 1) exponential growth in qualified, converting traffic, and 2) a steady reduction in Turnstile's weekly review time.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & SEO

  - [**Positive Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [Impressions grew from \~2k to 34k in 20 days.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [6 of 19 articles now rank for keywords (vs. 1 of 11 previously).](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - High-value rankings achieved: \#12 for "RevOps Best Practices" and \#8 for "B2B Subscription Management."
  - [**Key Concern:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [The "quote-to-cash" article, a core business topic, is not ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will analyze top-ranking competitors to diagnose the issue and optimize the article.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Technical Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [New articles are not indexing automatically, requiring manual submission to Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Content Quality & AI Feedback Loop

  - [**Problem:** Recurring AI errors persist despite repeated feedback (e.g., incorrect capitalization of "DocuSign," confusing payments with invoices).](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**Cause:** The AI's complex "agentic flows" can conflict, and feedback applied locally by editors is not consistently updating the central `Writing Guidelines` artifact that informs the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Turnstile:** Will now directly edit the `Writing Guidelines` Notion doc to ensure feedback is permanently integrated.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Will first apply all existing meta-feedback from article comments to the guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Example: "Tiered Pricing" Article**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [The article used the less common definition of "tiered pricing" (price per unit changes by quantity) instead of Turnstile's intended meaning (good/better/best packages).](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Action:** The article will be rewritten using Turnstile's definition, and the guidelines will be updated to prevent future confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Strategic Direction & Renewal

  - [**Content Strategy:** The team confirmed the current topic clusters are sound, with one refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**Refinement:** The "Revenue Operations" cluster will focus on financial operations, avoiding topics like sales territories that are outside Turnstile's core expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Renewal Decision:** Turnstile will renew the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)
  - [**Success Metrics for Renewal:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)
      - [**Qualified Traffic:** Exponential growth in traffic that converts to demo requests and paying customers.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** A steady reduction in Turnstile's weekly review time.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
      - [**Impact:** Organic social media shares and positive anecdotal feedback from industry peers.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
  - [**New Content Model: Thought Leadership**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2506.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create high-impact content that generates social conversation, not just SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
      - [**Method:** Turnstile will record voice notes with unique perspectives, which GrowthX will then develop into articles.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
      - [**First Pilot:** A flagship article on the Salesforce CPQ sunset, a timely topic representing a mass churn event and a major opportunity for Turnstile.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Diagnose and optimize the "quote-to-cash" article to improve its ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Share a list of top-ranking competitors for "RevOps Best Practices" and "B2B Subscription Management."](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Apply all existing meta-feedback from article comments to the `Writing Guidelines` Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Add Turnstile's "Proofreader Checklist" to the guidelines Notion doc for direct editing.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [**Turnstile:**](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2854.0)
      - [Record a voice note on the Salesforce CPQ sunset for the first thought leadership pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)
      - [Await a prompt from GrowthX before beginning the next round of article reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/aXLsqNy8UyyrY-x8rv9_crFt5SMWTdRj?tab=summary&timestamp=2994.0)
